steps.title: Match the student's goal
steps.content: The goal is to indicate the title of a novel that won a Nebula Award. The sentence must name the novel and connect it directly to the award.

steps.title: Reject vague alternatives
steps.content: Choice B gives only a publication fact. Choice C describes Brooks generally. Choice D avoids both the specific title and the named award.

steps.title: Name title and award
steps.content: Choice A names Babel-17 and states that it won a Nebula Award in 1967, exactly satisfying the goal. The answer is A.
